description: N8N or equivalent runs per-source cadence; fetch HTML/PDF; store raw snapshot + hash.
business_impact: Removes ad-hoc manual checks; proves repeatable monitoring.

description: Versioned docs per jurisdiction: source URL; fetched_at; content_hash; effective_date if known.
business_impact: Changes are attributable and replayable for audits / leadership questions.
notes: Seed NV + NY baselines for demo

description: Chunk/embed vs prior baseline; flag changed sections; optional keyword flags.
business_impact: Surfaces updates without rereading entire statute libraries.

description: Section/clause-level redline or side-by-side; not only blob diff.
business_impact: Executives trust the UI because they see exactly what moved.

description: Small LLM scores materiality to GLI; cites quoted spans; plain-English impact.
business_impact: Cuts reviewer noise — largest daily time save vs raw diff lists.
notes: Reggi-style alert relevance; keep prompts versioned

description: Approve/dismiss/assign; reviewer id; timestamp; optional reason.
business_impact: Humans stay accountable; avoids blind automation risk.

description: Generate proposed edits to requirements; templates; docs; test criteria with citations.
business_impact: Turns detection into actionable certification updates — core revenue protection.

description: On approval push structured package via MCP; retries; idempotent naming.
business_impact: Shows enterprise handoff without custom GLIAccess API in POC.
notes: Use env for drive/folder; no secrets in git

description: Email and/or Teams webhook; templates for staff vs operator vs regulator placeholders.
business_impact: Right stakeholders learn fast — fewer certification surprises.

description: EN-only for POC; optional ES toggle with locked static spans if time.
business_impact: Shows global readiness without blocking spine.
notes: Roadmap tie to full dictionary-driven translation

description: NV/NY excerpts + GLI standard snippets + optional SharePoint PDF samples.
business_impact: Bounded trustworthy corpus for leadership demo.
notes: Small files under repo or secure share

description: Question → top chunks → answer with inline citation markers to chunk IDs.
business_impact: Cuts internal research time; fewer wrong answers to staff.
notes: Demo with Nevada gaming chat patterns (independent testing labs / technical-standards questions); see Chat-tab flow in poc_low_level_architecture.md §3.3

description: Tag chunks by product family for scoped retrieval.
business_impact: Matches how labs organize work; improves answer precision.

description: List/cards for upcoming bills or draft rules with status.
business_impact: Leadership sees proactive compliance posture.

description: Manual seed 1–2 bills with metadata + external link.
business_impact: Proves UX without multi-state scrapers.

description: Scheduled scraper/API for bill status across jurisdictions.
business_impact: Removes manual bill tracking at scale.

description: No AI-only publish to SharePoint or external notification of unreviewed AI drafts.
business_impact: Trust + liability control for regulated industry.

description: LLM outputs must cite retrieved spans or clause IDs.
business_impact: Prevents hallucinated certification guidance.

description: Append-only log: hashes; model/prompt ids; reviewer actions; SharePoint file ids.
business_impact: Demonstrates governance for execs and future SOC2 path.
notes: Export JSON at end of demo

description: Per-URL last success; HTTP code; parse rate; stale alerts.
business_impact: Prevents silent scraper failure — missed regulatory changes.

description: Document data handling; AI governance gaps honestly; roadmap to SOC2.
business_impact: Sets enterprise buyer expectations without overclaiming.
